case_title: BANNETT, CONSTANCE VS SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY
PLTF FILING FOR MOTION FOR CONSIDERATION, PAID $10 CHECK,TOLD TO WAIT FOR AT LEAST 15 DAYS.
PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT(RECONSIDERATION) DENIED. COPIES OF DENIAL SENT TO PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,055.00 FILED BY BANNETT, CONSTANCE AS TO DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANNETT, CONSTANCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
